text:
やあ、お帰り。
少しは数を減らせたようだね。

事前の情報通り
見た目に反して面倒な攻撃をしてくる
ダーカーらしいね。

何にしても、アタシらは
ヤツらを狩り続けるだけだ。
次もよろしく

Hey, you're back.
Looks like there are fewer now.

The data was right--those Falspawn fight hard
despite their appearance.

But all we need to think about is hunting them
down to the very last one. I'll be counting on
you next time, too.
